history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, top-down shot of a young person's face, mostly obscured by a black hoodie pulled up high. Only their eyes and a portion of their nose are visible, peeking out from under the hood. Their eyes are dark and expressive, looking directly at the camera. Their hand, with long fingers and a pale complexion, is raised to their face, holding the fabric of the hoodie. A light-colored ring is visible on one of their fingers. The person has dark, slightly messy hair that spills out from under the hood. The background is a light brown, textured surface, possibly wood. The lighting is soft and somewhat dim, creating a moody atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by dark tones from the hoodie and hair, contrasted by the pale skin of the face and hand. A faint graphic of the number "10" with red and white accents is visible on the person's clothing below their hand. The overall mood is mysterious and intimate.
